phrases.cultural_note: The Collection de l'Art Brut is open Tuesday to Sunday. Check for seasonal variations.

responses.phonetic: duh onz uhr ah dee-zweet uhr, fair-MAY luh luhn-DEE
responses.local: De onze heures à dix-huit heures, fermé le lundi.

phrases.cultural_note: The museum has a standard entry fee with discounts for students and seniors.

responses.english: Twelve francs full price, six francs reduced.
responses.phonetic: dooz FRAHN plan tah-REEF, see FRAHN ahn ray-DWEE
responses.local: Douze francs plein tarif, six francs en réduit.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get there by bus
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is accessible by bus from the city center. Bus stop information is available at the tourist office.

responses.phonetic: pruh-NAY luh boos DUH oo VANT-ay-UHN, ah-REH boh-LYUH
responses.local: Prenez le bus 2 ou 21, arrêt Beaulieu.

phrases.cultural_note: The collection is in a converted villa near the cathedral in Lausanne's old town. Allow 1-2 hours for a thorough visit.

responses.english: In the Château de Beaulieu, Avenue des Bergières.
responses.phonetic: dahn luh shah-TOH duh boh-LYUH, ah-vuh-NOO day behr-ZHYEHR
responses.local: Dans le Château de Beaulieu, avenue des Bergières.
